title: FOOTLOOSE 80s DAY PARTY BEDFORD
description: Bedford, it's time for an 80s throwback in the afternoon. Four hours of pure retro brilliance, from Whitney's soaring choruses to Bon Jovi's fists-in-the-air rock, all wrapped up before the sun goes down. This is your chance to sing, sweat and dance like it's still 1989 without waiting until midnight. Perfect for mates who want maximum nostalgia and minimum hassle, Footloose Day Party is proof that daytime is prime time for pure 80s joy. By the end, your voice is gone — but your evening is still yours.
